onboarding.setup: Let's set up your safe space.
onboarding.name: Full Name

dashboard.subtitle: A quiet place for when everything inside you feels too heavy.

panic.title: Panic Help
panic.step1_title: Tips to go through the panic attack
panic.step1_1: Take a deep breath with me for 4 seconds
panic.step2_desc:
this is a fleeting feeling,
it will eventually pass
panic.step3_title: Choose what you need right now:
panic.step4_1: Take a quick cold shower. breathe slowly and let it pass through you.
panic.step4_2: imagine the panic attack like a wave, waves have ups and downs, so when it gets severe, its eventually going to get calm inside of you. Cold showers will refresh your body, clean stress off of you, regulate your blood circulation.

chat.title: Bree
chat.privacy: Your space is safe. This chat is encrypted and visible only to you {{linked}}.
chat.error: I'm having a little trouble connecting to my thoughts right now, but I am still here for you.

mood.title: Mood Tracker
mood.prompt: Click a box to log today's mood

journal.title: Journal
journal.placeholder:
[ Start writing here... ]

write it messy...
write it rushed...
just write what is inside you...
journal.feeling: How are you feeling right now?
journal.q1: What are you feeling right now?
journal.q2: What's been on your mind today?
journal.q3: What moment stayed with you the most today?
journal.q4: If your mind had a voice, what would it say?
